falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes below 4000 on 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakdown below this key support level would contradict the bottom pattern and indicate continued bearish momentum, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NYSE exceeds 2.5 billion shares for 5 straight days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate panic selling and a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the expected bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average of the Nasdaq 100 crosses below the 50-day moving average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bearish crossover would confirm a breakdown in trend structure, falsifying the pattern match to the 2024 August bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
